channel.title: Journal of Globalization and Development
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Globalization and Development

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Toby Melissa Monsod, Justin Matibag Muyot, Maria Socorro Gochoco-Bautista DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgd-2024-frontmatter2

item.title: An Analysis of the IMF’s International Carbon Price Floor
item.description: Article by Toby Melissa Monsod, Justin Matibag Muyot, Maria Socorro Gochoco-Bautista DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgd-2023-0102

item.title: India’s Energy and Fiscal Transition
item.description: Article by Toby Melissa Monsod, Justin Matibag Muyot, Maria Socorro Gochoco-Bautista DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgd-2023-0101

item.title: Macroeconomic and Fiscal Consequences of Climate Change in Latin America and the Caribbean
item.description: Article by Toby Melissa Monsod, Justin Matibag Muyot, Maria Socorro Gochoco-Bautista DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgd-2023-0100

item.title: Sovereign Debt and Climate Change in Argentina – The Catalytic Role of the IMF
item.description: Article by Toby Melissa Monsod, Justin Matibag Muyot, Maria Socorro Gochoco-Bautista DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgd-2023-0089

item.title: Climate Change Risks and Consequences on Growth and Debt-Sustainability in Africa
item.description: Article by Toby Melissa Monsod, Justin Matibag Muyot, Maria Socorro Gochoco-Bautista DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgd-2023-0103

item.title: Gaps and Fiscal Adjustment for Debt Stability in Climate-Vulnerable Developing Countries: How Large and by How Much?
item.description: Article by Toby Melissa Monsod, Justin Matibag Muyot, Maria Socorro Gochoco-Bautista DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgd-2023-0075
